metadata.description: Official Singlepane plugins for Claude — hospitality analytics tooling for Singlepane customers.

plugins.name: singlepane
plugins.description: Singlepane for Claude: the Singlepane MCP connector plus skills for hospitality asset-management workflows — Excel financial modeling with the Singlepane Excel add-in (summary P&Ls, department schedules, variance reports, portfolio rollups, STR dashboards, pace reports) and PowerPoint/Word document generation with the Singlepane Docs add-in (monthly performance decks, board and owner reports with live-refreshing data tags).
